description: Silver steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort and crystal embellishments around the bezelStainless steel strap with a butterfly claspPink mother of pearl dial with silver hands and crystal embellishmentsDate aperture across the right half of the dialtitan logo at the 12 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering Warranty: 2 years
